results.title: Rockwell Automation Hiring 2026 — Data Analyst | Apply Now - Jobscoupe.com
highlights:
Rockwell Automation Hiring 2026 — Data Analyst | Apply Now - Jobscoupe.com
...
Rockwell Automation Hiring 2026: Apply for Rockwell Automation Data Analyst jobs 2026 — openings for freshers and experienced candidates in India (Pune). Check eligibility, job description, salary range, and step-by-step application link. Fast hiring — apply today.
...
### 💼 Job Role: Data Analyst
...
### 📝 Job Description:
...
- Gather and validate business, technology, and data requirements to define scope, success criteria, and key metrics
...
- Translate business requirements into data modeling requirements, including entities, relationships, and data structures
...
- Design and build logical and physical data models from scratch (fact/dimension, star/snowflake schemas)
...
- Define data granularity, hierarchies, and semantic layers to support analytics and reporting needs
...
- Work closely with business stakeholders and architects to ensure data models align with enterprise data architecture
...
- Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance, including metadata definition and approval
...
- Review and optimize data models for performance, scalability, and maintainability
...
- Support production issues by analyzing data/model design gaps and providing improvements
...
- Lead discussions with stakeholders to align data model design with 3–6 month business priorities
...
- Collaborate across teams to identify dependencies and ensure smooth delivery of data solutions
...
- Use modeling and prototyping tools (Power BI or others) only to validate data models and business logic (not as primary responsibility)
...
### Responsibilities:
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Management Information Systems, or a related field
- Proven experience in designing and developing logical and physical data models (fact/dimension, star/snowflake schemas)
- Strong experience building data models from scratch (requirement analysis to implementation)
- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
...
### Must Have Skills:
...
Deep understanding of:
...
- Fact & Dimension modeling
- Star vs Snowflake schema
- Data warehousing concepts
...
### The Preferred:
...
Experience with Analytics & Data platforms such as:
...
- Azure SQL DW, AAS, Power BI
- Python, ADF, ADLS Gen2
...
### Important Note:
...
- Knowledge of planning applications (Hyperion, Enterprise Planning Management)
- Candidates with only visualization / Power BI experience without core data modeling design should not be considered
- SQL + Data Modeling is mandatory (others are optional)
...
### 📌 Eligibility Criteria
...
Qualification: B.E / B.Tech
...
Work Experience: Experienced
...
### ✅ How to Apply for Rockwell Automation Hiring 2026?
...
Interested candidates can apply online by clicking the application link below:
...
👉 Click Here to Apply Now

Associate Data Scientist at [Rockwell Automation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/rockwell-automation)
...
As a Associate Data Scientist and Software Engineer at Rockwell Automation, I specialize in building intelligent, scalable solutions at the intersection of AI, edge computing, and industrial automation. With hands-on experience in computer vision, Generative AI (RAG, Agentic AI), and real-time video analytics, I’ve contributed to projects ranging from circuit diagram-based quoting systems to edge-deployed object detection solutions with 99.9% accuracy. My work spans the full AI/ML lifecycle — from data preparation and model development to deployment, monitoring, and automation — using tools like YOLO, TensorRT, MLflow, Docker, and Kubernetes. I’ve also led small cross-functional teams and filed for IP protection for innovative solutions. With strong foundations in Python, C/C++, and cloud-based ML workflows (Azure Custom Vision, GPT-4o), I’m passionate about transforming complex problems into practical AI-driven tools that create real-world value. I enjoy collaborating with both technical and non-technical stakeholders to bring ideas from concept to deployment

results.title: Sri Archana
highlights:
Software Engineer 2 | GenAI & Backend Development | Industrial Automation Solutions @ Rockwell Automation
...
Software Engineer II at [Rockwell Automation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/rockwell-automation)
...
I’m a Software Engineer II with nearly 5 years of experience transforming complex technical challenges into simple, scalable, and impactful solutions. Over the years, I’ve grown from writing code that works, to building systems that think, adapt, and automate. My journey has taken me through Full-stack development, Data Engineering, and most recently, Generative AI, where I’ve developed chatbots using RAG pipelines, Kubeflow pipelines for embeddings, and LangChain, integrating them into business workflows to improve efficiency and user experience. I love finding patterns in repetitive work and turning them into automation that saves time, reduces errors, and delivers measurable value. Whether it’s automating data pipelines in AWS, improving data governance with Immuta, or simplifying API workflows in Python, my goal is always the same, build something meaningful that helps people or makes a business run smarter. Along the way, I’ve learned that great engineering is less about tools and more about ownership, curiosity, and clarity of thought. Those principles continue to guide how I design, debug, and deliver. Core Skills: Python | AWS | PySpark | SQL | Agentic AI | RAG | LangChain | OpenAI API | Data Pipelines | System Design | Automation | Flask | FastAPI | Kubernetes | Kubeflow Finding creative solutions to problems is something I have always enjoyed. I’m passionate about using technology to drive meaningful change. I would love to connect and explore the opportunities we may have!

highlights:
Data Scientist | Ex-Rockwell | Building Scalable AI/ML Solutions | GenAI | Azure | AWS

Hi there! I’m Amit, a Data Scientist with a background in instrumentation engineering who discovered a passion for data analytics and machine learning. My journey into data science began with hands-on experience in various technologies, which ignited my curiosity about extracting meaningful insights from data. To deepen my expertise, I pursued a professional course through IIITB, focusing on machine learning and advanced analytics. 📊✨ At Rockwell, I work on ML & GenAI solutions tailored to various industries, mentor junior team members, and implement models from start to finish. What excites me most about data science is the ability to transform data into valuable insights. Hallucinations are the silent killer of enterprise AI adoption — and the industry deserves better than slow, expensive, privacy-compromising solutions.

-phase protection — input AND output validation

results.title: Parker Carlson
highlights:
Software Engineer at Rockwell Automation
...
Software Engineer at [Rockwell Automation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/rockwell-automation)
...
Currently have the opportunity to experience a Leadership and Development Rotation Program with Rockwell Automation. This consists of a 2-year program with 4 distinct rotations within the company. Rotation 1 (June 21' - January 22') - Software and Hardware training in Cleveland, Ohio where I was onboarded with Rockwell Products. During this time I was introduced to Rockwell Automation and became comfortable with both PLC's and utilizing Rockwell's vast knowledge of people and resources. I enjoyed my time here meeting new friends and co-workers. Rotation 2 (January 22' - July 22') - Firmware SIC team in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. My first real experience in product development and testing. Learning new concepts about Hardware is challenging but rewarding. Rotation mainly consists of Hardware Integration testing and learning/implementing new electrical engineering and test engineer concepts. This rotation also gave me insight into firmware development in C++. Rotation 3 (July 22' - January 23') - Software Developer with the opportunity to help develop future software of Rockwell Automation. I am part of an AGILE team utilizing many languages such as TypeScript, Kotlin and GOlang. This rotation is also working with a cloud environment in Azure. Lead the way on developing a custom feature flag service in the GO language which will be used going forward on all GO development. Aided in E2E testing to ensure proper functionality of software in development. Rotation 4 - (January 23' - July 23') - Backend Infrastructure rotation dealing with Systems engineering and DevOps within Rockwell Automation. Primary role is working alongside other engineers in developing github actions workflows that allow for more efficient and comprehensive work that will be implemented by many teams around the company. Also took part in Rust development and testing.

results.title: Marketing Data Analyst and Enablement Lead | Hirevector
highlights: Rockwell Automation jest światowym liderem technologicznym, który koncentruje się na pomaganiu światowym producentom w zwiększaniu produktywności, zrównoważonego rozwoju i elastyczności. Zatrudniając ponad 28 000 pracowników, którzy każdego dnia czynią świat lepszym, wiemy, że mamy coś wyjątkowego. Za naszymi klientami - niesamowitymi firmami, które pomagają wyżywić świat, dostarczają leki ratujące życie na skalę globalną oraz koncentrują się na czystej wodzie i zielonej mobilności - nasi pracownicy są energicznymi rozwiązywaczami problemów, którzy są dumni z tego, jak praca, którą wykonujemy, zmienia świat na lepsze. Zapraszamy wszystkich twórców, myślicieli przyszłościowych i osoby rozwiązujące problemy, które szukają miejsca, w którym mogą wykonywać swoją pracę jak najlepiej. A jeśli to Ty, chcielibyśmy, abyś do nas dołączył! Opis stanowiska The marketing data analysis and enablement manager will lead the effort to drive continuous improvement of the data, analytics, and reporting that serves all aspects of marketing execution for Rockwell Automation. You will define the strategy for and ensuring the execution of initiatives related to analytics, reporting, data quality, data unification, and data distribution. You will be strategically focused on the governance and management of data and how it can be leveraged to drive more effective marketing. This position must prioritize data analysis as a discipline, oversee data technology strategy and set the reporting and data roadmap for Rockwell Automation marketing teams. You will be responsible for reporting definitions, setting data governance policies, ensuring documentation of all reporting and analytics are met, and ensuring consumers can use the data and reports correctly and accurately. The emphasis of this role will work with RA marketers to support the global marketing analytics platform and marketing databases. You will be the global point person for reporting, analytics, data management, and transformation. You will be hybrid working out of any of Rockwell Automation business locations in the United States. Your Responsibilities: Data Analysis Lead the design strategy to advance our data strategy Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and address data quality issues. Ensure compliance with ethical data practices, privacy regulations, and industry standards in all data analytics activities. Implement continuous improvement processes for analytics methodologies, ensuring adaptability to evolving needs. Define the data acquisition strategy to ensure that desired levels of breadth and quality are achieved. Create the measurement plan for data management, including database readiness metrics and metrics that capture the impact of database readiness on downstream marketing processes. Reporting and Analysis Manage a comprehensive reporting framework to provide accurate insights to partners. Analyze complex data sets to extract meaningful trends, patterns, and insights. Develop compelling narratives around analytical findings, presenting insights in a way that resonates with diverse stakeholders. Conduct root cause analysis to understand the underlying factors influencing key metrics and performance indicators. Analytics Develop predictive models to forecast trends, identify opportunities, and mitigate risks. Utilize statistical techniques to analyze large datasets and derive actionable insights for informed decision-making. Define and track goals to measure the success of projects and strategies. Create and apply segmentation strategies to understand customer behavior, preferences, and market dynamics. Strategic Planning Work directly with department heads and executive team to provide education and insights on the understanding of data, reporting needs, and developing advanced reporting solutions using tools like PowerBI. Work with senior management to understand our goals and develop data and analytics

results.title: Sr. Consultant - Advanced Process Control | CareerSync
highlights:
# Sr. Consultant - Advanced Process Control
...
Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers - amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility - our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.
...
- For over 25 years our team has used our software products and engineering procedures to create advanced analytics and model predictive control applications for customers worldwide. Our applications integrate with existing manufacturing systems to improve product quality, production capacity and energy usage. Our business is not dependent upon any one industry, and our staff receives broad exposure to customers and processes in varied manufacturing environments. We have business in food, polymers, biofuels, refining and minerals processing with many exciting developments to expand.
...
- As an Advanced Process Control Engineer, you will be at the heart of custom application delivery teams that use Rockwell Automation's advanced analytics and model predictive control products to create online applications to improve our customer's manufacturing processes. You will assess the customer's process, develop mathematical models that can be used to predict system behavior and configure online applications that use this knowledge to calculate process setpoints to control product quality, production capacity and energy usage. As part of our delivery team you will oversee the full technical implementation of the projects assigned to you from preliminary design through the completion of commissioning and customer acceptance. You will cover the technical implementation including supporting hardware installation and system integration.
...
- Keywords: Model Predictive Control, Advance Process Control
...
- You will operate as a Global Engineering expert as part of the Advanced Process Control and Optimization team with the purpose to guide Manufacturing improvements in encouraging quality improvement, increasing output and contributing to the bottom line across all processing industry customers in Latin America and worldwide, through:
...
- Basic DCS, Process Control and Instrumentation knowledgeExperience Areas Shall Include Linear And Non-linear Processes, Cost/benefit Analysis, Technical Design, Implementation, Commissioning, Startup, Maintenance, Sustainability, Trouble Shooting, Failure Analyzing And Overhaul Dedicated To The Advanced Process Control And Optimization Area Of Expertise, With Experience On Project Execution And Maintenance:
...
- APC technology, systems, industry standards, including step testing, model identification, inferential deployment, working and commissioning, cost/benefit analysis
- Advanced Solutions and Realtime Optimization technology, systems, industry practices
- Process Modeling and Optimization. Dynamic and steady-state optimization
- Advanced Regulatory control, Control loops performance, monitoring and fine tune
- Expert systems design and implementation
- Plant performance, historian and monitoring processes and systems.
- Experience in APC-applications, both linear as non-linear, (polymers)
...
- Degree: Chemical Engineering preferred, or another Engineering B.S.
- Being based in Brazil
- Manufacturing Experience (Technical engineering, Maintenance Management)
- At least 5 years of experience with a mix of experience in paper and pulp, polymers/plastics/petrochemicals, mining, cement, dairy, etc.
- Languages skill necessary: Portuguese and English fluency mandatory
